data.title: B.AI Releases Mid-April Weekly Report
data.description: According to its official Twitter account, B.AI released its latest weekly report, disclosing several significant advancements in its developer ecosystem and financial infrastructure development. On the product front, B.AI officially launched the OpenClaw auto-configuration script, introduced the open-source AI coding assistant BAI Code, and completed Stripe integration, laying a solid foundation for the payment and development experience within the ecosystem. Regarding wallet support, it added multi-link access to KuCoin Web3 and Trust Wallet. With its user base surpassing one million, B.AI is continuously expanding its developer toolchain and financial connectivity capabilities for autonomous intelligent agents through deep collaborations with platforms such as KuCoin and Symbiosis, aiming to build the core of AI infrastructure for the digital economy era.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Key Resistance Amid US-Iran Tensions
data.description: Bitcoin began the final full week of April with $81,000 marked as a significant resistance level. According to NS3.AI, renewed concerns over the US-Iran conflict have resurfaced, impacting market sentiment. Additionally, over $660 million in net inflows were recorded into US spot Bitcoin ETFs on Friday, indicating strong investor interest. Glassnode has noted that the current market drawdown is less severe compared to previous bear markets.

data.title: Israel's Security Cabinet Convenes to Discuss Iran and Lebanon Issues
data.description: Israel's security cabinet recently held a meeting to address concerns related to Iran and Lebanon. According to Odaily, the discussions focused on regional security matters involving these two countries. The meeting underscores ongoing tensions and the importance of strategic planning in the region.

data.title: Petrodollar System Under Pressure Amid Gulf Disruptions and Yuan Settlements
data.description: The petrodollar system is experiencing significant pressure due to disruptions in the Gulf region, increased yuan-based settlement activities, and warnings regarding reserve currencies during the ongoing US-Iran conflict. According to NS3.AI, these factors are converging to challenge the stability of the petrodollar system. The Wall Street Journal reported that officials from the United Arab Emirates have engaged in discussions with US officials about a potential dollar backstop. This comes after disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz have constrained oil exports and affected dollar inflows.

data.title: Bitcoin Trades Near $75,000 After April 17 Rejection
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading close to $75,000 following a rejection near $78,380 on April 17. According to NS3.AI, Glassnode reported a 10.75% increase in the hodler net position change over three sessions. During the same timeframe, Bitcoin's open interest decreased from $30.46 billion to $27.44 billion.

data.title: Digital Asset Investment Products See $1.4 Billion Net Inflows Amid U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Talks
data.description: Digital asset investment products experienced net inflows totaling $1.4 billion last week, marking the third consecutive week of gains. According to NS3.AI, CoinShares reported that Bitcoin products were the primary contributors, attracting $1.11 billion. Ethereum products also saw significant inflows, adding $320 million. However, XRP and Solana products faced net outflows during the same period. CoinShares attributed the overall trend to a stronger risk appetite following U.S.-Iran ceasefire negotiations.

data.title: Cobo selected as a key corporate partner by the Hong Kong Financial Secretary.
data.description: Cobo, a provider of digital asset custody and wallet infrastructure, announced that it has been selected as a key corporate partner by the Hong Kong Financial Secretary. On April 20, witnessed by Hong Kong Financial Secretary Paul Chan and other Hong Kong government leaders, Cobo COO Lily Z. King attended the signing ceremony and signed the agreement on behalf of the company, officially becoming a key corporate partner of the Hong Kong SAR Government. Singapore-based Cobo stated that it will establish its Northeast Asia regional headquarters in Hong Kong, with a projected cumulative investment of hundreds of millions of Hong Kong dollars by 2030. It will also significantly expand its local team, recruiting blockchain, security, and AI professionals globally, and continuously increasing its investment in Hong Kong. Simultaneously, Cobo plans to advance the R&D of its Cobo Agentic Wallet infrastructure in Hong Kong and implement some R&D work related to the Google Agentic Payment (AP2) protocol, further supporting the development of Hong Kong's fintech digital asset and AI industries.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with SBET down 4.63%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with COIN down 2.29%, MSTR down 2.02%, SBET down 4.63%, and HOOD down 2.16%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Foreign media: Israel's security cabinet held a meeting to discuss issues related to Iran and Lebanon.
data.description: According to Al Jazeera: The Israeli security cabinet held a meeting to discuss issues related to Iran and Lebanon.

data.title: Gate Founder Dr. Han: Three major opportunities in the next 1-2 years will focus on the intersection of RWA, AI+Crypto, and CeFi-DeFi.
data.description: On April 20th, Gate founder and CEO Dr. Han gave a group interview to the media at the Rosewood Hotel in Hong Kong. Dr. Han stated that in the next 1-2 years, the three core opportunities in the crypto industry will focus on the deep integration of RWA, AI, and Crypto, as well as the accelerated convergence of CeFi and DeFi. These three main trends are driving the industry from a single growth logic to a deeper structural upgrade, redefining underlying infrastructure and asset connectivity. In this trend, Gate AI's three-pronged approach has been successfully implemented, and the trading volume of Perp DEX and Gate Layer continues to grow, constantly leading industry transformation. Dr. Han emphasized that the crypto industry is moving from a high-growth experimental phase to a more standardized and structured cycle. Regarding the future market structure, he believes that exchanges, projects, institutions, and users will coexist in the long term, forming a more complex and mature ecosystem through mutual collaboration. Gate will focus on infrastructure capabilities and a diversified asset system, driving the platform to grow from a trading portal into a more complete crypto ecosystem infrastructure.

data.title: Kevin Warsh's Fed Chair Nomination Hearing Set to Impact Treasury Bond Market
data.description: Tomorrow's hearing on Kevin Warsh's nomination to chair the Federal Reserve is anticipated to be a significant event for the Treasury bond market, which has been disrupted by the ongoing conflict in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the potential implications of Warsh's leadership on monetary policy and market stability. The hearing is expected to provide insights into Warsh's approach to interest rates and economic strategy, which could influence investor sentiment and bond yields. Market participants are closely watching for any indications of policy shifts that could affect the broader financial landscape.

data.title: Solana Network Experiences Decline in First Quarter Metrics
data.description: Solana's network data showed a significant decline in the first quarter, with total fees dropping to $89.9 million. According to PANews, both on-chain activity and speculative demand have cooled. The report covers key data such as network revenue, stablecoin dynamics, and DeFi circulation speed, while also exploring future development potential in areas like perpetual contracts and asset tokenization.

data.title: RWA Advances Towards Composable Financial Infrastructure
data.description: Real World Assets (RWA) are evolving from mere tokenization to becoming a composable financial infrastructure. According to PANews, this shift signifies a significant development in the financial technology landscape, where RWAs are increasingly integrated into broader financial systems. This transformation is expected to enhance the efficiency and accessibility of financial services, offering new opportunities for innovation and growth in the sector.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | BRICS Nations Increase Gold Reserves Amid Global Trade Developments
data.description: BRICS nations have significantly increased their share of global gold reserves, holding 17.4% as of April 2026, compared to 11.2% in 2019. According to NS3.AI, this rise in reserves has occurred alongside gold trading near $4,850 per ounce. The accumulation of gold reserves has been driven by accelerated sovereign purchasing following the 2022 freeze of approximately $300 billion in Russian reserves. Additionally, BRICS countries have initiated a pilot of the Unit, a trade instrument backed by gold and BRICS currencies, further influencing their gold reserve strategy.

data.title: CoinShares: Net inflows of approximately $1.4 billion into digital asset investment products last week.
data.description: According to CoinShares' latest weekly report, digital asset investment products recorded a net inflow of approximately $1.4 billion last week, the strongest weekly performance since January of this year, marking the third consecutive week of net inflows. This represents approximately 0.91% of the total assets under management of $155 billion. Specifically, Bitcoin products saw an inflow of approximately $1.116 billion, driven by its breakthrough of $76,000 and its exit from a nearly two-month consolidation range. Ethereum products recorded an inflow of approximately $328 million, bringing the year-to-date net inflow to approximately $197 million. Regionally, the US saw an inflow of approximately $1.5 billion, Germany saw an inflow of $28 million, while Switzerland experienced a net outflow of approximately $138 million, the largest weekly outflow since November of last year, diverging from the overall recovery in risk appetite.

data.title: Ethereum-Based Meme Coin ASTEROID Surges Amid Market Volatility
data.description: On April 20, Ethereum-based meme coin ASTEROID experienced a 16% increase within an hour, with its market capitalization rising above $150 million, currently reported at $158 million. The coin is priced at $0.000375, with a 24-hour trading volume reaching $49.6 million. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the narrative behind ASTEROID originates from Liv Perrotto, a 15-year-old girl whose greatest wish was to meet Elon Musk. Before her passing, she helped design a Shiba Inu-themed toy named 'Asteroid.' Following her death, her mother publicly addressed Musk, and the story was revisited by media personality Glenn Beck on his program. On April 19, Musk agreed to make Asteroid the mascot for SpaceX. BlockBeats cautions users that meme coin trading is highly volatile, often driven by market sentiment and speculative concepts, lacking intrinsic value or practical use cases. Investors are advised to be aware of the risks involved.

data.title: Fitch Affirms Philippines' Rating Amid Rising Risks
data.description: Fitch Ratings has confirmed its rating for the Philippines, reflecting a baseline scenario where the country's medium-term GDP growth is expected to remain robust despite increasing risks. According to Jin10, this assessment underscores confidence in the Philippines' economic resilience and growth potential in the face of potential challenges.

data.title: Significant USDC Deposit Fuels Leveraged Brent Oil Long Position
data.description: An address has recently deposited 9 million USDC into Hyperliquid, according to NS3.AI. This deposit was used to open a 3x leveraged long position on Brent oil, valued at $18.08 million. Additionally, the same address maintains a short position on 254,771 SOL, worth $21.6 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Faces Potential Squeeze Amid Heavy Positioning
data.description:
Bitcoin's price currently sits above the 'max pain' level, with significant positioning at $75,000. According to CoinDesk, traders are now confronted with the possibility of a market squeeze or a pullback as the cryptocurrency approaches its 'max pain' expiry. This situation arises when the price of bitcoin is above the level where the most options contracts would expire worthless, creating a scenario where traders might experience financial pressure. 

The concept of 'max pain' refers to the price point at which the largest number of options contracts expire worthless, causing the maximum financial loss for option holders. As bitcoin's price hovers above this critical level, traders are closely monitoring the market for signs of a potential squeeze or a pullback. A squeeze could occur if traders who are short on bitcoin are forced to buy back their positions, driving the price higher. Conversely, a pullback might happen if the market corrects itself, bringing the price back down towards the 'max pain' level. 

This dynamic is particularly relevant as traders navigate the volatile nature of the cryptocurrency market. The heavy positioning at $75,000 suggests that many traders have placed significant bets on bitcoin reaching or surpassing this price point. However, the uncertainty surrounding the 'max pain' expiry adds an element of risk, as market movements could lead to unexpected outcomes. As the expiry date approaches, traders will need to remain vigilant and prepared for potential shifts in the market landscape.

data.title: The largest on-chain short position in SOL was opened with 3x leverage, resulting in a $18.08 million long position in Brent crude oil.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, in the past 10 hours, address “0xb581d667C53fd8a50bF7ffd817BE0E62DAA16F4f” deposited 9 million USDC into Hyperliquid to open a 3x leveraged long position of 200,687 xyz:BRENTOIL tokens, worth $18.08 million. This address still holds a short position of 254,771 SOL tokens, worth $21.6 million.
